mapper.select: SELECT a.model_name AS supModelNumber, a.order_auto_id AS orderAutoId, a.sys_mxzd_model_number AS mxzdModelNumber FROM xbpj_company_model_gl a WHERE a.sys_mxzd_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{mxzdModelNumber}, '%') ORDER BY a.sys_mxzd_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT a.`new_pointNo` AS `newPointNo`, a.`new_modelNo` AS `newModelNo`, a.`old_modelNo` AS `oldModelNo` FROM `audit_update_modelNo` a
mapper.update: UPDATE audit_elements_data_cut_in SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE `audit_elements_data_support_v2` SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_find_database SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_handover_model SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_info SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%'), `pointNoLs` like CONCAT('%', #{newPointNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_info_log SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%'), `pointNoLs` like CONCAT('%', #{newPointNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_model_evaluation SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_online_model SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')

UPDATE audit_elements_operation_steps SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%'), `pointNoLs` like CONCAT('%', #{newPointNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE audit_elements_system SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE `spl_business_examine` SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE `spl_model_type` SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%'), `pointNoLs` like CONCAT('%', #{newPointNo}, '%') WHERE audit_model_number like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE spl_business_db SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE model_no like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE spl_business_dy SET modelNoLs like CONCAT('%', #{newModelNo}, '%') WHERE model_no like CONCAT('%', #{oldModelNo}, '%')
UPDATE `xbpj_company_model` a SET a.`hava_pro` like CONCAT('%', #{proType}, '%') WHERE a.`ModelNo` like CONCAT('%', #{auditModelNumber}, '%')
mapper.select: SELECT a.`audit_model_number` AS auditModelNumber, a.`audit_model_number_new` AS auditModelNumberNew FROM `model_msg_update` a WHERE audit_model_number_type = '是'

SELECT info.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, info.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, info.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, info.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, info.execution_logic AS auditModelExecutionLogic, modelType.`write_time` AS writeTime, evaluation.model_state AS deploymentModelState, evaluation.modeling_method AS deploymentModelingMethod, info.model_code AS deploymentModelCode, info.model_code_file_id AS deploymentModelCodeFileId, suppAcc.name AS dataAssetObjectNameCN, suppAcc.code AS dataAssetObjectNameEN, suppAcc.assetCode AS dataAssetCode, suppAcc.status AS dataAssetStatus, suppAcc.originalSystem AS dataAssetSourceSystem, suppAcc.interName AS dataAssetInterfaceName, suppoNoAcc.data_supporter AS nonDataAssetDataSource, suppoNoAcc.name AS nonDataAssetObjectNameCN, suppoNoAcc.code AS nonDataAssetObjectNameEN, suppoNoAcc.assetCode AS nonDataAssetCode, suppoNoAcc.status AS nonDataAssetStatus, suppoNoAcc.originalSystem AS nonDataAssetSourceSystem, suppoNoAcc.interName AS nonDataAssetInterfaceName FROM audit_elements_info info LEFT JOIN `spl_model_type` modelType ON info.`audit_model_number` = modelType.`audit_model_number` LEFT JOIN `audit_elements_model_evaluation` evaluation ON info.audit_model_number = evaluation.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN (SELECT audit_model_number, `name`, `code`, assetCode, `status`, originalSystem, interName FROM `audit_elements_data_support_v2` WHERE isdel = '1' AND is_acc = '1') suppAcc ON info.`audit_model_number` = suppAcc.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN (SELECT audit_model_number, `name`, `code`, assetCode, `status`, originalSystem, interName, data_supporter FROM `audit_elements_data_support_v2` WHERE isdel = '1' AND is_acc = '0') suppoNoAcc ON info.`audit_model_number` = suppoNoAcc.audit_model_number where info.`audit_model_number` is not null AND info.`audit_model_number` LIKE '%HQ000%' ORDER BY info.`audit_model_number`

SELECT info.audit_model_number AS auditModelNumber, info.audit_model_name AS auditModelName, info.primary_business_process AS primaryBusinessProcess, info.secondary_business_process AS secondaryBusinessProcess, info.audit_business_logic AS auditBusinessLogic, info.expected_risks AS expectedRisks, modelType.write_time AS writeTime, modelType.model_owner AS modelOwner, modelType.dock_dept AS dockDept, elements.code_requirement AS codeRequirement, elements.file_name AS fileName, elements.specification_requirement AS specificationRequirement, elements.reference_number AS referenceNumber, elements.dispatch_time AS dispatchTime, elements.start_time AS startTime, elements.standard_basis AS standardBasis, online.number_units_covered AS numberUnitsCovered, online.number_professional_institutions AS numberProfessionalInstitutions, online.number_of_provincial AS numberOfProvincial, online.model_online_time AS modelOnlineTime, online.service_ownership_system AS serviceOwnershipSystem, online.model_running_frequency AS modelRunningFrequency, info.running_mode AS runningMode, info.quality_rating AS qualityRating, online.sources_audit_practice AS sourcesAuditPractice, online.ascription_special AS ascriptionSpecial, online.online_remarks AS onlineRemarks, modelType.def_exam_userDept AS defExamUserDept, caseFxal.problem_summary AS problemSummary, caseFxal.problem_detail_description AS problemDetailDescription, caseFxal.audit_period AS auditPeriod, caseFxal.involved_unit AS involvedUnit, caseFxal.audit_project AS auditProject, caseYsfxal.problem_summary AS ysProblemSummary, caseYsfxal.problem_detail_description AS ysProblemDetailDescription, caseYsfxal.audit_period AS ysAuditPeriod, caseYsfxal.involved_unit AS ysInvolvedUnit, caseYsfxal.audit_project AS ysAuditProject FROM audit_elements_info info LEFT JOIN spl_model_type modelType ON info.audit_model_number = modelType.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN audit_elements_online_model online ON info.`audit_model_number` = online.`audit_model_number` LEFT JOIN audit_elements_system elements ON info.audit_model_number = elements.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM `audit_element_case` WHERE is_del = 0 AND `type` = '1') caseFxal ON info.`audit_model_number` = caseFxal.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM `audit_element_case` WHERE is_del = 0 AND `type` = '2') caseYsfxal ON info.`audit_model_number` = caseYsfxal.audit_model_number WHERE elements.delete_status = '1' AND info.`audit_model_number` LIKE '%HQ000%' ORDER BY info.audit_model_number, info.quality_rating
SELECT * FROM model_info_table_01 ORDER BY auditModelNumber, runningMode
